Primary and Non-Contributory wording applies per policy endorsement. Per Project Aggregate Limit applies as indicated on the endorsement schedule.

LOC-001: Corporate Headquarters & Main Terminal — 1200 Nationwide Boulevard, Columbus, OH 43215 (Occupancy: Warehouse); LOC-002: Rickenbacker Air Hub — 2500 Norton Road, Columbus, OH 43217 (Occupancy: Warehouse); LOC-003: Cleveland Distribution Center — 6000 Rockside Woods Boulevard, Independence, OH 44131 (Occupancy: Warehouse); LOC-004: Pittsburgh Regional Terminal — 500 Technology Drive, Canonsburg, PA 15317 (Occupancy: Warehouse)

The insured's principal operations consist of: Regional trucking and freight logistics — LTL and FTL general freight, warehousing and distribution services across the Midwest and Mid-Atlantic corridors. Entity type: Corporation.

remarks: ENDORSEMENT SCHEDULE; ADDITIONAL INSURED: Quantum Realty Management Inc. is included as additional insured per written contract, agreement, or permit as respects General Liability. SPECIAL CONDITIONS: Primary and Non-Contributory wording applies per policy endorsement. Per Project Aggregate Limit applies as indicated on the endorsement schedule. LOCATION DESCRIPTIONS include four warehouse locations in Columbus, OH; Independence, OH; and Canonsburg, PA. NATURE OF OPERATIONS: Regional trucking and freight logistics — LTL and FTL general freight, warehousing and distribution services across the Midwest and Mid-Atlantic corridors.
